// why this file: Build config used ONLY by Stryker's buildCommand (see stryker.config.json).
It is deliberately self-contained (no `extends`): Stryker copies this
mirror tsconfig.base.json + tsconfig.test.json (CommonJS output so the
extensionless relative imports resolve under node; see tsconfig.test.json),
with two mutation-specific differences, same as packages/shared:
- noCheck: Stryker's mutants are syntactically valid but often
type-invalid; we emit without type checking so every mutant actually
RUNS and must be killed by a test, not by the compiler.
- no declarations/sourcemaps: dead weight per sandbox build.
